summary: RETEST of two fixes from iteration_10. Both fixes VERIFIED end-to-end. (1) /api/voice/track now accepts JSON body — frontend api.post('/voice/track', {event_name}) returns 200 from headless Chromium for all observed events (voice_page_viewed fired 3x on /voice page, all 200). Backend pytest TestTrack updated to send JSON instead of multipart and all 3 cases pass: allowed event 200, unknown 400, all 7 allowed events 200 each. (2) Copy button now uses /app/frontend/src/lib/clipboard.js with navigator.clipboard primary + textarea+execCommand fallback. Clicking Copy on a voice message card in headless Chromium shows the '✓ Copied!' state on the clicked card (1 Copied + 5 Copy on the other cards), and POST /api/voice/copy-event fires as 200. Regression: /voice as anon loads, examples chip auto-runs the text pipeline, all 6 tone cards render within ~7s, 5 refine chips per card work (refine click keeps 6 cards). Auth login (sr-tester@example.com / TestPass123!) succeeds → /dashboard. /smart-reply (anon) correctly redirects to /login?redirect=/smart-reply. /voice/history (anon) correctly redirects to /login?redirect=/voice/history. /smart-reply (authed) and /voice (authed, '19/20 LEFT TODAY' pill) both render. /mood-chat and /login render. Backend pytest 21/21 PASS in 31.7s.
critical_code_review_comments: voice.py /track endpoint now uses `payload: dict` — works fine but a Pydantic model (e.g. class TrackEventBody(BaseModel): event_name: str) would give automatic 422 on missing field and self-document the schema. Optional polish.
clipboard.js fallback is correct: secure-context guard prevents the navigator.clipboard call from throwing in non-secure contexts, and the textarea+execCommand path handles webviews. Good.
VoiceMessaging.copyMessage shows toast.error on failure but only sets copiedId on success — copy_count therefore only increments on real successful copies. Good privacy/integrity.

Anon limit gating still has the minor race (consume after LLM round-trip) noted in iteration_10. Not addressed in this iteration; impact remains low (would require two concurrent generations from same device_id within a few-hundred-ms window).

success_rate.frontend: 100% — both retest fixes verified, full regression sweep clean

seed_data_creation: Re-used existing voice session for sr-tester. Burned one fresh anon device_id to 3 trials inside test_burn_three_then_block and cleaned up the voice_anon_trials row. Reset voice_daily_count to 0 on the test user. No production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All previously reported defects are fixed. Backend regression file /app/backend/tests/test_voice_messaging.py (21 tests, ~32s). Test_track_* tests now use JSON body to match the new endpoint signature. Two remaining low-priority observations (none are bugs): (a) consider migrating /track to Pydantic model for cleaner 422s; (b) consider pre-Whisper energy gate for silent uploads (test currently accepts 200 OR 422 for a pure-tone WAV).
rca of the issue: Iteration_10 issues both confirmed fixed. (1) Track 422 root cause was the global axios `Content-Type: application/json` header conflicting with FormData multipart boundary detection. Fixed at the backend by switching `event_name: str = Form(...)` to `payload: dict` (JSON), so the frontend's existing JSON-by-default axios instance works without any per-call header override. Verified via 3x 200 responses on /voice page load. (2) Copy fail root cause was navigator.clipboard.writeText throwing in non-secure / webview contexts with no fallback. Fixed by introducing /app/frontend/src/lib/clipboard.js with a textarea+execCommand fallback path guarded by isSecureContext. Verified by clicking Copy in headless Chromium and observing both the '✓ Copied!' UI state and a 200 POST to /api/voice/copy-event.
